sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, num Int32, arr_arr Array(Array(Int32)), val Nullable(String));
SELECT groupBitXor(num), groupBitXor(arr_arr[1][1]) FROM (SELECT id, num, arr_arr FROM test_table WHERE val IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY id HAVING groupBitXor(num) < 25;
SELECT groupBitXor(arr_arr[1][1]), groupBitXor(num) FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE num > 0) GROUP BY id HAVING groupBitXor(num) > 5;
SELECT groupBitXor(num), groupBitXor(arr_arr[1][2]) FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING groupBitXor(num) > (SELECT avg(num) FROM test_table) + 4;
CREATE TABLE tmp_table AS SELECT DISTINCT num FROM test_table WHERE val IS NULL;
SELECT groupBitXor(num) FROM (SELECT id, num FROM tmp_table) GROUP BY id UNION ALL SELECT groupBitXor(num) FROM test_table WHERE val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT groupBitXor(arr_arr[1][1]) AS arr_xor FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE arr_arr[1][1] IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY arr_xor HAVING arr_xor > 5;
SELECT groupBitXor(CAST(val AS Int32)) FROM test_table WHERE val IS NOT NULL; SELECT groupBitXor(CAST(val AS Int32)) FROM test_table WHERE val IS NULL;
SELECT id, groupBitXor(num) FROM (SELECT id, num FROM test_table) GROUP BY id HAVING groupBitXor(num) = 0;
